name: do178-audit-hub
description: DO-178C Audit Hub — ports-and-adapters audit and evidence explorer for DO-178C / DO-331 programs with a deterministic AeroNav fallback workspace.

scripts.build: npm run build:runtime && npm run build:server && npm run build:web
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b --pretty false && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.server-tests.json --noEmit
scripts.test: npm run test:ui && npm run test:server
